segments.text: In this new Techno phone, you can instantly upgrade the camera, the battery, speaker, and even more.
Normally, if you want all these features, you're forced to carry a heavy, bulky brick in your pocket all day. Techno fixed this by starting with an incredibly thin, minimal base phone.
It is super sleek and perfect for your everyday scrolling. But what happens when your battery dies or you want a premium camera? You just snap the upgrades on. Going for a long trip,
Doing a photo shoot? Snap on a literal DSLR lens. But is carrying phone pieces around actually practical? Yes, 90% of
the time you just need a simple lightweight phone. This lets you carry the heavy bulky features only when you actually need them. So, which module would you use the most? Tell me in the comments.
